data.current_description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error. Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.
data.summary_suggestion: Test caller permissions on resource
data.description_suggestion: Tests which permissions the authenticated caller has on the specified resource. Accepts a TestIamPermissionsRequest containing a list of permissions to check. Returns a TestIamPermissionsResponse with the subset of requested permissions the caller actually has. Returns an empty permission set if the resource does not exist (not a NOT_FOUND error). Designed for permission-aware UIs and tools, not for authorization enforcement. May fail open without warning.
data.reasoning: Original description is comprehensive but lacks input/output schema details. message: Operation 'apigeeregistry.projects.locations.operations.cancel' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details. Missing summary. Description is comprehensive and well-detailed, explaining best-effort semantics, error handling, verification methods, and the resulting state after cancellation. Summary was the only gap; description provides excellent AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.
data.summary_suggestion: Request cancellation of a long-running operation
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is comprehensive and well-detailed, explaining best-effort semantics, error handling, verification methods, and the resulting state after cancellation. Summary was the only gap; description provides excellent AI agent interpretability.
